identity.name: James Mitchell
identity.bio: Project manager, dad of two, amateur woodworker, professional snack fetcher.

career.career_aspiration: Director level in 2-3 years, possibly VP track, open to switching to tech company
career.past_roles: PM at Wells Fargo (2016-2020), business analyst at Deloitte (2012-2016)
career.education: BS Business Administration, UNC Chapel Hill; MBA, Wake Forest

health.conditions: Mild hypertension (managed), occasional lower back pain
health.fitness_goals: Lose 20 lbs, get back to running a 10K, lower blood pressure naturally

food.favorite_foods: Smoked brisket, chicken parm, street tacos, loaded baked potatoes
food.disliked_foods: Sushi (texture thing), beets, anything too spicy
food.coffee_tea: Drip coffee with cream, 2-3 cups before noon
food.alcohol: Bourbon, craft beer on weekends, not during the week

home.smart_home: Ring doorbell, Nest thermostat, Alexa in every room (kids' fault)
home.home_projects: Building a deck, need to repaint the garage, want to set up a workshop in the basement

finance.financial_goals: Pay off remaining mortgage faster, fully fund kids' 529 plans, build up emergency fund to 6 months
finance.insurance_types: Health, dental, vision, auto, homeowner's, life, umbrella
finance.side_income: Occasional woodworking commissions (cutting boards, small furniture)

hobbies.favorite_games: Madden, Mario Kart (with kids), poker night with buddies
hobbies.favorite_artists: Tom Petty, Zach Bryan, OutKast, Chris Stapleton
hobbies.tv_movies: Yellowstone, Top Gun: Maverick, The Office (rewatching forever), Reacher
hobbies.books_reading: Reads mostly on Audible during commute — business books, thrillers (Lee Child, Michael Connelly)
hobbies.dream_destinations: Montana ranch trip, Italy with the wife, Disney World again for the kids
hobbies.collections: Nothing specific, accumulating too many power tools

personality.values: Family, reliability, hard work, community, faith
personality.pet_peeves: People who don't follow through, unnecessary meetings (ironic, I know), leaving lights on

aspirations.life_goals: Be a great dad, make director by 42, build a woodworking workshop, take the family to Europe
aspirations.learning_now: Advanced woodworking joints, basic home electrical (to finish the basement)
aspirations.want_to_learn: Investing strategy beyond index funds, Spanish (wife's been pushing this)
aspirations.challenges: Never enough time, balancing work ambition with being present for kids, health/weight
aspirations.proudest_achievement: Built a treehouse for my kids completely from scratch
aspirations.biggest_fear: Missing my kids growing up because I was too focused on work
aspirations.ideal_day: Sleep in to 7, big breakfast with the family, morning in the workshop, afternoon at the park with kids, grill dinner, movie night, kids in bed by 8, bourbon on the porch
aspirations.causes: Youth sports programs, veterans' support, local community development
